# bDevCapabilityType

**Instance Property**

The capability type.

## Declaration

```swift
uint8_t bDevCapabilityType;
```

## Getting the Properties

- **bLength**: The size of the descriptor.
- **bDescriptorType**: The type of the descriptor.
- **bmAttributes**: A bitmap encoding of supported device-level features.

items.description: A bitmap encoding of supported device-level features.
